title: Quality of Horse
description: A simple & highly configurable mod for "improving" horses
body:
# Quality of Horse (QoH)

> **Note:**  
> This project is still very early and not finished yet

Quality of Horse is a simple mod designed to improve the usage of your horses, by turning them into a Donkey + Camel.

## Features
 - Have two players riding on a horse at once
 - Give your horse a chest like a donkey!
 - Your horses can swim
 - You always have a lead! Just shift+right-click on your horse
 - Horses will follow you now, no more losing them

## Socials
Thanks to [@LieOnLion](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion) for allowing us to use their discord, you can join here [discord.lieonlion.dev](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/)

## Credits
 - [**LieOnLion**](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion) | Help with horse chest rendering
 - [**adellive**](https://www.youtube.com/adellive) | Emotional support (He asked for the mod)
 - [**Chested Companions**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chested-companions) | Reference implementation for chest rendering
